en.extract:
The sulphur-throated finch (Sicalis taczanowskii) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in Ecuador and Peru.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland.

The '''sulphur-throated finch''' ('''''Sicalis taczanowskii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].
It is found in [[Ecuador]] and [[Peru]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]].
